title: Close #1211 host-repo learning

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Make PR #1222 fully and honestly close GitHub #1211 by adding a real host-repo proof lesson capture, promotion, and reuse route.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Use existing Memory, config, docs, tests/checks, Planning, and issue owner surfaces before adding new first-class state; keep heuristics as discovery candidates only; preserve provenance for confirmed and negative lessons.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Implementation details for Memory note encoding, proof-route payload shape, tests, docs, PR body, and planning closeout.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A correct fix requires a new product-level repo affordance table, changes unrelated workflow surfaces, or cannot prove confirmed and negative route reuse end to end.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement Memory-backed proof-route lesson loading, capture actions, negative-route suppression, tests, docs, PR body, and honest #1211 closeout.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Proof output exposes actionable Memory/config/docs/checks/Planning/issue capture or promotion next steps for confirmed and negative lessons.
A confirmed Memory-owned route can be reused as confirmed proof evidence later.
A negative Memory-owned route prevents the same command from being selected as confirmed proof later.
Generic language/project heuristics remain fallback discovery candidates only.
The command-generation pytest symptom remains covered by dependency/runtime/manual verification instead of a failing pytest requirement.
PR #1222 body and planning closeout honestly use Closes #1211 with evidence.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.
